title: Write a PRD
description: Draft a crisp product requirements document.
content:
Write a PRD for: {{feature}}

Include: the problem and who has it, the goal and success metrics, what's in and explicitly out of scope, the core user flows, and the open questions. Keep it decision-oriented — every section should help someone build or prioritize. Avoid solutioning the implementation. End with the riskiest assumption that, if wrong, sinks the feature.
